n: A Long-awaited Banquet -- King Aragorn II Elessar

steps.t: Unquieted tables can be found throughout Merethrond. King Aragorn II Elessar has asked you to quiet tables in Merethrond that he might offer a toast.
King Aragorn II Elessar can be found in Merethrond. You have quieted all of the tables in the main hall of Merethrond. You should return to King Arago…
